creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2011-01-18 12:59:42 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/p5-HTML-HTMLDoc Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This Module provides an OO-interface to the htmldoc program.
  You can use it to produce PDF or PS files from a HTML-document.
  Currently many but not all parameters of HTMLDoc are supported.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/HTML-HTMLDoc/
  
  PR:             ports/153955
  Submitted by:   Menshikov Konstantin <kostjnspb@yandex.ru>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1510    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/textproc/p5-HTML-HTMLDoc/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/textproc/p5-HTML-HTMLDoc/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/textproc/p5-HTML-HTMLDoc/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/textproc/p5-HTML-HTMLDoc/pkg-plist (new)
